name: linkedin-post-writer
description: Convert blog posts to native LinkedIn posts (text + 7-10 slide carousel), 2026 algorithm-optimized. 5 skills + 1 agent: brief router, text post writer, carousel composer with per-slide image prompts, Depth Score validator (>=80 gate), and end-to-end orchestrator. 12 text hook formulas, 5 cover hook frameworks, 20-rule anti-slop rubric. v0.4.4 codifies the 5-act narrative spine — HOOK → FORESHADOW → BODY → PEAK → CTA — as the structural template for every carousel, and mandates nyentrik-dan-nyeleneh visuals on BOTH the HOOK (cover) and CTA slides as structural twins. Defers cinematic image craft to the upstream `ai-image-carousel-prompt-gen` plugin as canonical source of truth (same standards, this skill only adds the LinkedIn delta). Documents 4:5 (1080×1350) as the cross-platform reuse target for IG + LinkedIn + TikTok parity — gated on backend wrapper supporting 4:5 (currently locked at 1:1 per draft #28 production evidence). v0.4.3 fields retained: top-level caption + hashtags + link_comment with 4 schema invariants. Pure content generation — emits draft JSON for an admin panel to consume.
